visual_description: A young child with blonde hair is held by an adult whose torso and arms are visible, wearing a white shirt and dark pants. The child’s hands are held by the adult’s hands, and the child looks forward with their mouth slightly open. The scene is dimly lit, with a red object partially visible on the left side of the frame.
